create.prompt:
Use case: homepage branding logo animation
Primary request: Create a subtle dawn-glow homepage logo animation from the reference image.
Scene/background: same ausos logo card and soft aurora gradient from the input reference
Subject: the exact white ausos icon and wordmark from the reference
Action: a very gentle dawn-like glow travels behind the logo from lower left to upper right while the logo remains completely static
Camera: locked-off, centered composition, no zoom
Lighting/mood: soft dawn glow, calm and polished
Color palette: white, cyan, mint, lavender, peach
Timing/beats: 4 seconds, one slow light pass, settles back into the reference look
Constraints: preserve the existing look and logo exactly; do not redraw or reinterpret any letter, symbol, bar, or spacing
Avoid: no new text, no misspelled text, no logo movement, no hard flares, no flicker, no perspective warp
